gloss:
The abstract greatest-compliant structure produced by the relational/measurable observation specification is, on unfolding the definitions, exactly measurable bisimilarity. The abstract forced object and the concrete one coincide.

**Cites** `WMSpec.Grammar.relationalGrammar_forced_eq` — the corpus theorem this result restates and discharges.

**Original contribution.** The corpus lemma supplies the definitional equality; the thesis uses it to certify that the general lattice-level forcing principle and the concrete measurable forcing theorem are one and the same object, closing the loop between the abstract and instance statements.

statement.pretty: ∀ {S : Type u_1} [inst : MeasurableSpace S] {V : Type u_2} {A : Type u_3} (𝒯 : Set (S → V)) (Pfam : A → S → MeasureTheory.Measure S), WMSpec.Grammar.ObservationGrammar.forced (WMSpec.Grammar.relationalGrammar 𝒯 Pfam) = WMSpec.General.bisimilarityM 𝒯 Pfam

title: Eidometry.Thesis.forced_eq_relational
